name: Fridge Magnet
description: A classic fridge magnet as a great souvenir of your visit.

name: Ceramic Mug
description: Ceramic mug with Spiš Castle motif. Capacity 300ml, dishwasher safe.

name: Dragon Sword
description: Wooden toy sword for children. Hand-carved, available in various styles.

name: Cotton T-Shirt
description: Quality cotton T-shirt with Spiš Castle print. 100% cotton, available in S-XXL.

name: Castle Sweatshirt
description: Cotton sweatshirt with embroidered castle silhouette. 100% cotton, several sizes.

name: History of Spiš Castle
description: Illustrated book with old photos, plans and history of the castle. 180 pages, hardcover.

name: Wooden Jewelry Box
description: Hand-crafted wooden jewelry box with castle engraving. Oak wood, felt lining inside.

name: Castle Poster
description: Large format art poster of Spiš Castle at sunset. 60x40cm, premium matte paper.

name: Postcard Set
description: Set of 10 premium postcards featuring different castle views and seasons.

name: Knight Figurine
description: Hand-painted metal knight figurine in authentic medieval armor. 12cm tall.

name: Castle Model Kit
description: 3D wooden model kit of Spiš Castle. 150+ pieces, educational assembly for all ages.

name: Keychain
description: Metal keychain with miniature castle tower design. Zinc alloy, silver or gold finish.

name: Castle Pin Badge
description: Enamel pin badge with Spiš Castle silhouette. Collectible quality, butterfly clasp.

name: Medieval Shield
description: Decorative wooden shield with coat of arms. Wall-mountable, 30cm diameter.

name: Honey from Spiš
description: Local wildflower honey from the Spiš region. 250g glass jar, raw and unfiltered.

name: Castle Wine
description: Local wine with custom Spiš Castle label. Red or white, 0.75L bottle.

name: Canvas Tote Bag
description: Reusable canvas tote bag with castle print. Eco-friendly, sturdy cotton.

name: Snow Globe
description: Glass snow globe with miniature Spiš Castle inside. Shake to see snowfall over the ruins.

name: Wooden Bow & Arrow
description: Toy bow and arrow set for young knights. Safe rubber-tipped arrows, handmade.

name: Photo Book
description: Hardcover photo book with 100+ premium photographs of the castle through all seasons.

name: Castle Puzzle 1000pc
description: 1000-piece jigsaw puzzle of aerial castle view. 68x48cm when complete, high quality.
